kitDescription: Privaty is a Water AR attacker whose Skill 1 fires on entering Full Burst, buffing all allies for 10s with +ATK, +Reload Speed, +Attack Damage, and a large Max-Ammo cut that tandem-gates her own shot count. Skill 2 procs when her last bullet hits a target, applying a Damage-Taken debuff and a 256.17%-ATK rider; if that target is already in Designated Target status it instead deals a 1687%-ATK rider. Her Burst buffs her own Elemental-Advantage damage by 130% for 10s, deals 1407.64%-ATK burst damage to enemies, applies the Designated Target status, and stuns for 3s. As a Water unit she holds elemental advantage on a Fire boss, which is what the 130% buff amplifies.

redAssertions: S5 'P5 damageTakenPct' — filtered the boss debuff by casterIdx===PRIVATY and found 0. RULED RECON_ERROR/test artifact, NOT an override divergence: engine fact (a) — boss-held debuffs emit buffApply with casterIdx===null, so a casterIdx filter finds 0 even when the debuff IS applied. Driver P7 asserts the SAME line correctly via stat+value (targetIdx===null = boss) and is GREEN; the probe confirms damageTakenPct 10.01 is applied. The other 24 S5 assertions (S1 trigger/duration/scope, 256.17 cadence, 1687 gate + non-vacuity, elemAdvantage self/burstCast + inert-on-neutral-boss, 1407.64 FB-exempt, Max-Ammo tandem) all PASSED vs the shipped override; 2 SKIPPED = stun + boss ATK▼, both correctly unmodeled.

skill1.formulaCheck: atkPct feeds the ATK base; scope all-allies, 10s duration match prose
skill1.explanation: Encoding matches prose and formula. P5c pins fullBurstEnter cadence (once per fullBurstStart frame, not burstCast).

skill1.formulaCheck: reloadSpeedPct is the correct stat; scope/duration match
skill1.explanation: Faithful; P5 confirms applied to all 4 allies for 10s.

skill1.blindSaid: S6 identical; S2b top adversarial catch (Max-Ammo tandem)
skill1.formulaCheck: maxAmmoPct negative matches the ▼; tandem-gates shot count
skill1.explanation: Faithful. P5b: removing maxAmmoPct REDUCES the 256.17 rider count, confirming the Max-Ammo→shot-count tandem is live (the highest-risk misread, correctly modeled).

skill1.formulaCheck: attackDamagePct routes into the damageUp multiplicative bucket per SSOT
fullBurstEnter (not burstCast) matches 'when entering Full Burst'
skill1.explanation: Trigger timing correct; P5c discriminates fullBurstEnter from burstCast cadence.

skill2.formulaCheck: damageTakenPct is the taken-bucket stat on the boss; lastBullet trigger + 10s match prose
skill2.explanation: Faithful. The S5 RED on this line is a RECON_ERROR in the S5 test (casterIdx filter vs fact (a) casterIdx===null), NOT an override defect — driver P7 asserts it via stat+value and is GREEN; probe confirms the debuff is applied. P7 bounds it by last-bullet cadence.

skill2.formulaCheck: function-damage rider; noRange force-set by engine (S6 omission equivalent); riders crit at caster rate by default (S6 crit:true equivalent to driver default)
skill2.explanation: Faithful. P1: rider count ≈ reload count and ≪ shot count; counterfactual shotFired → count ≫ discriminates lastBullet. P4 pins FB-by-timing (in-FB riders fbMajorApplied===true). S6 diff is redundant/inert (see gotchas: none).

skill2.blindSaid: S6: flatDamage 1687 crit:true + same requiresTargetStatus gate (converged from prose, no leak)
skill2.formulaCheck: gated rider; requiresTargetStatus matches 'last bullet hits a target in Designated Target status'
skill2.explanation: Faithful. P2: every 1687 rider inside a privaty burstCast+10s window, non-vacuity (≥1 in AND ≥1 out-of-window last bullet), count1687<count256; counterfactual ungated → 1687 out-of-window discriminates the gate. S2b's MEASUREMENT-GATED label was driven by a stale types.ts leak; the gate IS enacted and S2b's own proposed assertion equals driver P2.

burst.formulaCheck: elemAdvantageDamagePct is the correct damageUp-bucket stat for the element-wheel advantage; self scope + 10s match
burst.explanation: Faithful. P6: applied per burstCast; S5 confirmed inert on a neutral boss (only bites when advantaged), consistent with the formula's ×1.10 element interaction.

burst.formulaCheck: burst-cast damage is FB-exempt (lands before FB window); burst bucket per SSOT
burst.explanation: Faithful. P6: nuke once per burstCast, burst bucket, fbMajorApplied===[] (FB-exempt) — matches the burst-cast-FB-exempt rule.

burst.formulaCheck: stun is a CC primitive with no player-damage path in v1; out of damage scope
burst.explanation: Deliberately unmodeled with reason recorded; correctly it.skip'd in S5 (1 of 2 skips). Acceptable documented gap — no player-damage observable.

burst.driverSaid: unmodeled.burst: ATK▼5.02 inert in v1; Designated Target status modeled via targetStatus
burst.blindSaid: S6 kept inert atkPct -5.02 as a stat; S2b MEASUREMENT-GATED/UNMODELED
burst.formulaCheck: boss ATK feeds no player-damage path in v1, so the stat is inert whether modeled (S6) or listed unmodeled (driver); the load-bearing part — the Designated Target STATUS that gates the 1687 rider — IS modeled via targetStatus
burst.explanation: Documented gap. The functionally relevant effect (the status gate) is modeled and tested (P2); the ATK▼ number is inert in v1. Driver's unmodeled-listing and S6's inert stat are behaviorally identical.

verdictRationale: No REAL-GOTCHAs. All 9 functional kit lines are FAITHFUL (right bucket, trigger timing, stacking, scope, duration, target set) and the 2 remaining lines (3s stun; boss ATK▼5.02) are correctly DOCUMENTED_GAPs with the functionally load-bearing part — the Designated Target status that gates the 1687 rider — modeled and tested. The single S5 RED (damageTakenPct filtered by casterIdx===PRIVATY → 0) is a RECON_ERROR/test artifact, not an override divergence: engine fact (a) makes boss debuffs emit casterIdx===null, the driver's P7 asserts the same line via stat+value and is GREEN, and the probe confirms the debuff is applied. The two independent blind re-derivations converged strongly: S6's override is functionally identical to the driver's on every point (the S6 diffs — crit:true vs default, noRange omitted vs set, inert atkPct -5.02 stat vs unmodeled — are all redundant/inert with NO functional divergence), and the 1687 Designated-Target gate converged from the prose alone with no leak. Fire-rate is verified (P1/P2/P5b/P5c/P6/P7 each pin the prose-implied cadence) and the load-bearing tests discriminate (lastBullet vs shotFired, gated vs ungated 1687, Max-Ammo tandem removal). Nothing must change for GO. Same-model residual the owner should spot-check: (1) confirm boss-held debuffs truly emit casterIdx===null (fact (a) — the root of the S5 RED and a cross-unit test-harness trap); (2) the 1687 gate semantics and the Max-Ammo▼→shot-count tandem were the highest-risk reads and rest on the same model family; (3) all magnitudes are owner/measurement-gated (they match the prose numbers exactly, but were not independently measured here).
